scripts.check: pnpm run docs:build && pnpm run check:dashboard && pnpm --filter @meldbase/client check && pnpm --filter @meldbase/client build && pnpm --filter @meldbase/server check && pnpm --filter @meldbase/server build && pnpm --filter @meldbase/react check && pnpm --filter @meldbase/react build && pnpm --filter @meldbase/example-realtime-todos check
scripts.build:docs-sdk: pnpm --filter @meldbase/client build && pnpm --filter @meldbase/server build && pnpm --filter @meldbase/react build
